title: Minecraft Story Mode Ultimate
description: an all-in-one pack, overhauling the whole game with the intent of 1-1 recreating the look and feel of minecrafts most nostalgic spin-off
body:
# The Ultamate all-in-one pack aiming to recreate the full look and feel of Minecraft Story Mode.
includes details big and small like pebbles on grass, logical stone bricks, 3d chicken legs and more!
![pebbles, bricks and a chicken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2caed7238c933969d523759f21caac9262b4e7d3.png)
Stylistic updates to new features too like 3d warden antenae and mouths.
![3d skeletons, wardens, and creepers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8330d1c284046db226c272b0e017267893f11ac.png)
A brilliant blend of old-school pigmen and the new piglins lend the nether an air of timesless nostalgia.
![piglin models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c87d7c85951ae5749f75112b22fd2595653e66ad.png)
Updated Villager models and "Nurm-like" Cartographers
![3 villagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96776b37ab0c22c10b6f417a483473037c9f16fc.png)
And so much more!
